request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Quick Check. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Acids, Bases and Salts. Must show visually: Ask a student to identify if vinegar is acidic or basic based on its smell/taste description and predict litmus result.; Quick fire: 'Blue litmus in acid? Red litmus in base?'; What happens to turmeric when soap water is added?. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for Quick Check that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains quick_assessment.. Teaching context: Check understanding during the lesson.. Student takeaway: Reflect on what they can already answer.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
